ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_code" INTEGER /* Code number assigned to the sample */,
  "clump_thickness" INTEGER /* Thickness of the tumor clump */,
  "cell_size_uniformity" INTEGER /* Uniformity of cell size */,
  "cell_shape_uniformity" INTEGER /* Uniformity of cell shape */,
  "marginal_adhesion" INTEGER /* Marginal adhesion of the cells */,
  "single_cell_size" INTEGER /* Size of single epithelial cells */,
  "bare_nuclei" INTEGER /* Number of bare nuclei */,
  "bland_chromatin" INTEGER /* Bland chromatin features */,
  "normal_nucleoli" INTEGER /* Number of normal nucleoli */,
  "mitoses" INTEGER /* Number of mitoses observed */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class label indicating the diagnosis (e.g., malignant or benign) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "storage_condition" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the sample (e.g., frozen, refrigerated) */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., processed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of cancer or related diseases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor (e.g., oncologist) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the doctor */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital or institution the doctor is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being diagnosed */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor making the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date on which the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_result" TEXT /* Result of the diagnosis (e.g., malignant, benign) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the doctor in the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst works in */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., logistic regression, SVM) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on test data */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model architecture and features */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model making the prediction */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being analyzed */,
  "predicted_class" TEXT /* Predicted class based on the model (e.g., malignant, benign) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the model in the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed (e.g., patient records, model predictions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of specific permissions granted to the role (e.g., view data, manage users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_patient_link" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the sample belongs to */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected from the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_analyst_link" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who developed the model */,
  "development_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was developed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_doctor_link" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who reviewed the model */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "doctor_id")
)
